title: SECOND CHANCE RENTERS EDUCATION - 211info
text: ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY SECOND CHANCE RENTERS EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a series of eight classes designed to lay the foundation of what people with poor rental and/or credit history need to know in order to become successful and responsible tenants. Upon graduation and completion of all required activities, Participants receive a certificate of completion and performance guarantee that is honored by landlords throughout Lane County. 2890 Chad Drive Eugene, OR 97408 Eligibility: Individuals with barriers to renting (eviction history, poor credit history, ex-offender status, homelessness, etc.) Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, closed holidays Classes: Varies; most classes start at 5pm Email (541) 731-4857 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 731-4857 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None, donations welcomed DOCUMENTS: None at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm, closed major holidays Services: Tenant Readiness Education Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - VALLEY INDIVIDUAL DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNT COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - RECYCLING AND MANUFACTURING HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE HOUSING PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - REGIONAL HOUSING REHABILITATION LOAN PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - FINDING PATHS TO PROSPERITY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY
